bambu_cool_plate.name: Cool Plate (original)
bambu_cool_plate.notes: Discontinued in 2024 but still in many users' hands. Apply glue stick before each PLA print.
bambu_cool_plate.surface_description: Textured aluminium; PLA prints cold with glue.

bambu_cool_plate_supertack.name: Cool Plate SuperTack
bambu_cool_plate_supertack.notes: Supersedes the original Cool Plate. Strong room-temp grip without glue stick. PLA only.
bambu_cool_plate_supertack.surface_description: Proprietary adhesive coating; PLA prints cold, no glue.

bambu_engineering.name: Engineering Plate
bambu_engineering.notes: Bambu's recommended plate for ABS / ASA / PA. Use glue for PLA.
bambu_engineering.surface_description: Smooth PEI with stronger high-temp grip.

bambu_high_temp.name: High-Temperature Plate
bambu_high_temp.notes: Required for high-temp polymers; needs heated chamber.
bambu_high_temp.surface_description: Designed for PEEK / PEKK / PEI / PPSU.

bambu_pei.name: Textured PEI Plate
bambu_pei.notes: Default for X1/X1C/P1/P1S printers. Strong all-round adhesion.

biqu_cryogrip_frostbite.name: Cryogrip Frostbite
biqu_cryogrip_frostbite.notes: High-tack variant; some users report needing release tool when cool.
biqu_cryogrip_frostbite.surface_description: Premium BIQU cold plate; even stronger grip than Pro.

biqu_cryogrip_pro.name: Cryogrip Pro
biqu_cryogrip_pro.notes: Strong cold grip; release on cooling. Compatible with most heatbeds.
biqu_cryogrip_pro.surface_description: Entry-level BIQU cold plate; PLA at room temp.

creality_cold_plate.name: Cold-Print Plate
creality_cold_plate.notes: Newer accessory plate intended for cold PLA printing. Verify exact SKU compatibility with your printer model.
creality_cold_plate.surface_description: PLA-targeted cold-print surface; no bed heat.

creality_frosted_carborundum_glass.name: Frosted Carborundum Glass
creality_frosted_carborundum_glass.notes: Shipped on early Ender 3 V2 / CR-10. Cooling release for PLA.

creality_pei_spring_steel.name: PEI Spring Steel Plate
creality_pei_spring_steel.notes: Default on K1 / K1 Max / K1C and many later Ender models.
creality_pei_spring_steel.surface_description: Textured PEI on flexible spring steel.

energetic_pei_smooth.name: Double-Sided PEI Spring Steel (smooth)
energetic_pei_smooth.notes: Reverse side of the textured Energetic plate; mirror-finish first layer.
energetic_pei_smooth.surface_description: Smooth PEI side of dual-surface spring steel.

energetic_pei_textured.name: Double-Sided PEI Spring Steel (textured)
energetic_pei_textured.notes: Popular Amazon upgrade plate; flip for smooth PEI on the back.
energetic_pei_textured.surface_description: Textured PEI side of dual-surface spring steel.

geco_cold.name: Geco Cold Plate
geco_cold.notes: Niche brand; verify dimensions match your printer's heatbed.

generic_buildtak.name: BuildTak / PEX (generic)
generic_buildtak.notes: Replace sheet when scratched; aggressive grip on PLA + PETG.
generic_buildtak.surface_description: Textured polymer sheet adhered to bed.

generic_garolite.name: Garolite (G-10/FR-4) — nylon only
generic_garolite.notes: Best surface for PA / PA-CF; keep clean and dry.
generic_garolite.surface_description: Glass-fibre composite sheet; outstanding nylon grip.

generic_glass.name: Glass (generic)
generic_glass.notes: Apply glue stick or hairspray; PLA pops off at room temp.
generic_glass.surface_description: Plain borosilicate glass, often with mirror back.

generic_pei_smooth.name: Smooth PEI (generic)
generic_pei_smooth.notes: Glossy first layer. Strong adhesion at temp; clean with IPA.
generic_pei_smooth.surface_description: Smooth PEI sheet, mirror-like first-layer finish.

generic_pei_textured.name: Textured PEI (generic)
generic_pei_textured.notes: Best all-round default. Works for PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, TPU.
generic_pei_textured.surface_description: Powder-coated PEI on flexible spring steel.

kdeavi_cold.name: Kdeavi Cold Plate
kdeavi_cold.notes: Budget cold plate. PLA only; expect variable QC across batches.

numakers_icegrip.name: IceGrip Cold Plate
numakers_icegrip.notes: Marketed for cold PLA on Bambu / Prusa / Voron / Creality. Wait until plate is fully cool before flexing to release.
numakers_icegrip.surface_description: Adhesive-coated cold plate; very strong room-temp grip.

prusa_satin_pei.name: Satin Powder-Coated PEI Sheet
prusa_satin_pei.notes: Smoother than textured but still grippy; great for ABS/ASA.

prusa_smooth_pei.name: Smooth PEI Sheet
prusa_smooth_pei.notes: Use IPA before PLA; Windex or glue for PETG to prevent over-stick.
prusa_smooth_pei.surface_description: Smooth PEI on spring steel; glossy first layer.

prusa_textured_pei.name: Textured Powder-Coated PEI Sheet
prusa_textured_pei.notes: Default on MK4 / MK4S / XL. Best all-round Prusa surface.
prusa_textured_pei.surface_description: Powder-coated PEI on spring steel; matte finish.

wham_bam_hotspring.name: HotSpring (PEX)
wham_bam_hotspring.notes: Excellent on PLA/PETG/TPU; clean with IPA between prints.
wham_bam_hotspring.surface_description: Flexible PEX-coated spring steel; aggressive grip.
